title: Loops API keys should not be disclosed
description: Loops is an email platform for SaaS companies. API keys authenticate requests to send transactional and marketing emails, manage contacts, and trigger email workflows. Exposing keys allows unauthorized email sending and contact data access.
recommendation: Remove Loops API keys from source code. Store in environment variables. Rotate at app.loops.so/settings/api.
impact: Unauthorized email sending to your audience, contact list access and modification, and email workflow manipulation.

checks.message: Loops API key detected in variable assignment. Loops API keys authenticate email platform requests including sending transactional and marketing emails, managing contact lists and properties, triggering automated email workflows, and accessing email analytics. Exposing this key allows unauthorized email sending and contact data manipulation. Rotate immediately at app.loops.so/settings/api.
Loops credential detected. Rotate at app.loops.so/settings/api.
